questions.question: What sport are the players practicing, and where does this take place?
questions.answer_key: Hockey players practice in an indoor ice rink

questions.question: Describe what one player is doing with the puck during the scene.
questions.answer_key: One player skates swiftly across the ice, controlling the puck with precision

questions.question: What type of drills are the other players engaged in?
questions.answer_key: Players pass the puck back and forth in drills
